scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && shx mkdir -p dist/skills/bundled dist/catalog dist/tools/process dist/assembly/hcp-process dist/process-tools/src dist/sandbox dist/runtime dist/hooks dist/policy dist/context dist/memory dist/messages dist/types dist/package-overlay && shx cp -r skills/bundled/* dist/skills/bundled/ && shx cp catalog/*.toml catalog/*.json dist/catalog/ && shx cp tools/process/*.toml dist/tools/process/ && shx cp assembly/hcp-process/*.toml dist/assembly/hcp-process/ && shx cp sandbox/*.toml sandbox/README.md dist/sandbox/ && shx cp runtime/*.toml runtime/README.md dist/runtime/ && shx cp hooks/*.toml hooks/README.md dist/hooks/ && shx cp policy/*.toml policy/README.md dist/policy/ && shx cp context/*.toml context/README.md dist/context/ && shx cp memory/*.toml memory/README.md dist/memory/ && shx cp messages/*.toml messages/README.md dist/messages/ && shx cp types/*.toml types/README.md dist/types/ && shx cp package-overlay/*.toml package-overlay/README.md dist/package-overlay/ && shx cp process-tools/Cargo.toml process-tools/Cargo.lock process-tools/README.md dist/process-tools/ && shx cp process-tools/src/*.rs dist/process-tools/src/
